project_type: Python multi-agent investment analysis platform with FastAPI dashboard, CLI, MCP server, and multi-platform bots
test_framework: pytest with test files in tests/
verification_instructions: Run python -m pytest tests/ -q and confirm all tests pass (currently 99)
environment_constraints: OPEN_INTERNET network mode. Python 3.11 available. FastAPI/uvicorn/jinja2/pydantic installed.
contribution_requirements: Code must not break existing tests. All new code follows existing patterns.
key_patterns: BaseAgent subclasses with analyze() method. MarketContext dataclass. AgentResponse with signal/score/confidence. DecisionCoordinator for consensus. Dashboard uses FastAPI+Jinja2. Bots use platform-specific SDKs.
directory_structure: src/augur/ - main package, dashboard/ - FastAPI web app, tests/ - pytest tests, config/ - YAML config
